zh.Brenchley, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特布藍利
zh.Brenchley, Kent, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭肯特布藍利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Clement Forman於1548年出生在英國肯特布藍利時，他的父親William Forman38歲，母親Agnes29歲。他於1568年2月16日與Margery Baldock在英國肯特藍爾爾斯特結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1600年2月11日在他的家鄉享年52歲，埋葬在英國肯特布藍利。

zh-hans.Brenchley, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特布藍利
zh-hans.Brenchley, Kent, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰肯特布藍利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Clement Forman于1548年出生在英国肯特布藍利时，他的父亲William Forman38岁，母亲Agnes29岁。他于1568年2月16日与Margery Baldock在英国肯特藍爾爾斯特结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1600年2月11日在他的家乡享年52岁，埋葬在英国肯特布藍利。

nameMeanings.name: Forman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status name for a leader or spokesman for a group, from Middle English fore-man ‘foreman, reeve’ (from the Old English prefix fore- ‘foremost’ + mann ‘man’). The word is attested in this sense from the 15th century, but is not used specifically for the leader of a gang of workers before the late 16th century.
English: variant of Fordman with loss of -d-, from Middle English ford ‘ford’ (Old English ford) + man, denoting either a dweller by or a keeper of a ford. Compare Forder .

variants.name: Foreman
meanings: Altered form of North German Formann, a variant of Fuhrmann or Fohrman .

variants.name: Formanek
meanings: Czech (Formánek): from a diminutive of Forman .

variants.name: Forder
meanings: English: from an agent derivative of Middle English ford ‘ford’ (Old English ford), denoting either someone who lived near a ford or the keeper of a ford.

nameMeanings.name: Clement
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Clemens (genitive Clementis) meaning ‘merciful’. This was borne by several early saints, notably the fourth pope and the early Christian theologian Clement of Alexandria (Titus Flavius Clemens, ad ?150–?215 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Clement Forman was born in 1548, in Brenchley, Kent, England, his father, William Forman, was 38 and his mother, Agnes, was 29. He married Margery Baldock on 16 February 1568, in Lamberhurst, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 11 February 1600, in his hometown, at the age of 52, and was buried in Brenchley, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Clement Forman est né en 1548, à Brenchley, Kent, Angleterre, son père, William Forman, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Margery Baldock le 16 février 1568, à Lamberhurst, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 11 février 1600, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Brenchley, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Clement Forman 1548 in Brenchley, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Forman 38 und seine Mutter Agnes 29. Er hat am 16. Februar 1568 in Lamberhurst, Kent, England Margery Baldock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Februar 1600 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Brenchley, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Clement Forman è nato il nel 1548 nel Brenchley, Kent, England, il suo padre, William Forman, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Agnes, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Margery Baldock il 16 febbraio 1568, nel Lamberhurst, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 11 febbraio 1600, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Brenchley, Kent, England.

ja.Lamberhurst, Kent, England: イギリスケントランバーハルスト
ja.Brenchley, Kent, England: イギリスイギリスケントブレンチリー
ja.Brenchley, Kent, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスケントブレンチリー
ja.lifeSummary: Clement Formanが1548年にイギリスケントブレンチリーで生まれた時，父William Formanは38歳，母Agnesは29歳であった。1568年2月16日にイギリスケントランバーハルストでMargery Baldockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1600年2月11日に故郷で52歳で死去し，イギリスケントブレンチリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Clement Forman(이)가 1548년 영국 켄트 브렌클리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Forman(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1568년 2월 16일 영국 켄트 램후르스트에서 Margery Baldock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1600년 2월 11일 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 브렌클리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Clement Forman nasceu em 1548, em Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Forman, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Baldock em 16 de fevereiro de 1568, em Lamberhurst, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de fevereiro de 1600, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Clement Forman родился в 1548 г. в местности бренчли, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени William Forman было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Baldock 16 февраля 1568 г. в местности лэмбирурст, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 11 февраля 1600 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности бренчли, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Clement Forman nació en 1548, en Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, William Forman, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Agnes, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Margery Baldock el 16 de febrero de 1568, en Lamberhurst, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 11 de febrero de 1600, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra.
